subcodes.first_line: All the peoples and kindreds of the earth have awaited the days of the Manifestation, and unto all hath the True One, exalted be His glory, [bestowed this] [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع عالم و طوائف امم منتظر ایام ظهور بوده اند و جمیع را حق جل جلاله باین
subcodes.subjects: @suffering; rejection of Christ, @prophecy and fulfillment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment
